# GigWiseTax
> Free gig worker tax calculator for US independent contractors. Covers all 51 states. Self-employment tax 15.3%, federal + state income tax, quarterly payments. IRS mileage rate 72.5¢/mile 2026. No signup, no data stored.

## Platform Calculators
- /doordash : DoorDash tax calculator 2026 — SE tax, quarterly payments, mileage deduction
- /uber : Uber driver tax calculator 2026 — SE tax $7,750 on $35K net
- /instacart : Instacart shopper tax calculator 2026
- /lyft : Lyft driver tax calculator 2026
- /amazon-flex : Amazon Flex tax calculator 2026
- /airbnb : Airbnb host tax calculator 2026
- /turo : Turo host tax calculator 2026
- /onlyfans : OnlyFans creator tax calculator 2026
- /etsy : Etsy seller tax calculator 2026
- /fiverr : Fiverr freelancer tax calculator 2026
- /upwork : Upwork freelancer tax calculator 2026
- /grubhub : Grubhub driver tax calculator 2026
- /shipt : Shipt shopper tax calculator 2026
- /rover : Rover pet sitter tax calculator 2026
- /taskrabbit : TaskRabbit tax calculator 2026
- /walmart-spark : Walmart Spark driver tax calculator 2026

## Key Tax Facts 2026
- IRS mileage rate: 72.5 cents per mile
- SE tax rate: 15.3% (12.4% Social Security + 2.9% Medicare)
- SE tax formula: net income x 0.9235 x 0.153
- 1099-NEC threshold (OBBBA 2026): $2,000
- Quarterly deadlines: April 15, June 16, September 15, January 15
- QBI deduction: up to 20% of qualified business income
